subcodes.first_line: O divine pauper! His Holiness Muhammad, the Messenger of God, called His blessed self poor and proclaimed "Poverty is my glory." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فقیر الهی حضرت محمد رسول الله نفس مبارک را فقیر خواند و الفقر فخری فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
